metadata.description:
A Remote Configuration-enabled API key for the Datadog account
(see https://app.datadoghq.com/organization-settings/api-keys).
The Datadog site to use for the Datadog Agentless Scanner
Number of Agentless Scanner instances to launch
The name of the user-assigned managed identity to be used by the Datadog Agentless Scanner virtual machine instances.
The set of scopes that the Datadog Agentless Scanner is allowed to scan
Specifies the version of the scanner to install
Specifies the channel to use for installing the scanner
Repository URL to install the scanner from.
The administrator username for the VM
SSH public key of the administrator user
Tags to apply to all resources.

variables.name: DatatogAgentlessScanner
